source.reference: User-provided C-position front / right-front / back contact sheet

license.library_rule: Retain the user-supplied reference and Hunyuan job record. Confirm source-image rights and Tencent service terms before external commercial release.

geometry.coverage: head through above-knee dress silhouette; lower legs and shoes are not present

required_before_motion_use: Create or generate full lower-body geometry
Validate shoulders, elbows, neck and facial silhouette at shot distance

quality_boundary: A high-fidelity, textured C-position character for close and medium previs. It is not a full-body animation asset: the lower legs and shoes are absent and the mesh has no animation rig or production retopology.
